ListItem.Para: EICAS communication alert chime operates normally.
When necessary, the evacuation information may be given by the cabin crew through the passenger address, or through the cabin interphone.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided EICAS communication alert message system operates normally.

OperationNote.Para: Prior to flight, the pilot-in-command must brief flight crew members that EICAS Communication Alert Chime is inoperative. During the flight, flight crew must maintain heightened awareness as there will be no EICAS Communication Alert Chime.

ListItem.Para: Alternate procedures for contacting flight attendants are established and used.

Note.Para: Passenger to attendant call system is considered a Nonessential Equipment and Furnishings (NEF) item.
Any flight attendant call light function that operates normally may be used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Prior to flight, the pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members that Passenger Address system must be used to communicate with cockpit and cabin.

ListItem.Para: Flight attendant call lights operate normally.
Alternate procedures for contacting flight attendants are established and used.

Note.Para: Passenger to attendant call system is considered a Nonessential Equipment and Furnishings (NEF) item.
Any cabin chime system function that operates normally may be used.

ListItem.Para: Prior to departure, advise Purser that the PA may be used to initiate contact with crew members as required.
Standard PAs may be used for non normal situations, or for normal situations use a pre-established phrase such as; "Would XYZ call the flight deck when convenient please?"

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Associated OFCR or OFAR cabin interphone handset system operates normally.
Alternate procedures for contacting crew/attendant rest occupants are established and used.

Note.Para: Any alerting system function that operates normally may be used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Prior to flight, the pilot-in-command must brief crew members that OFCR/OFAR Call light/Chime Systems are inoperative. Alternate procedure for notifying OFCR or OFAR occupants must be established and used.
